# opnsense_wireguard_settings (Data Source)

Reads WireGuard general settings from the upstream system.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_wireguard_settings" "current" {}

output "wireguard_enabled" {
  value = data.opnsense_wireguard_settings.current.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the WireGuard daemon is enabled.
- `id` (String) Always set to `wireguard_settings`.
